name: Binara Lokuliyanage
title: Full Stack Web Developer
summary: Full Stack Web Developer with around 5 years of experience building web applications, CMS websites, eCommerce platforms, REST APIs, and cloud-deployed applications. Strong background in Angular, PHP, Laravel, WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, MySQL, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud platforms including AWS and GCP. Experienced in both hands-on development and team leadership.
careerGoal: Seeking software engineering, full stack developer, frontend developer, backend developer, CMS developer, and web developer roles in Australia.

limitations: Do not claim deep commercial .NET experience; mention hands-on exposure only.
Do not claim deep commercial python experience; mention basic/project exposure only.
Do not claim deep banking domain experience unless the JD only requires transferable payment or integration knowledge.
Do not invent enterprise-scale AI production experience; mention AI API integration and portfolio AI project honestly.
If a role requires heavy React experience, mention good React exposure but stronger background in Angular development.
rules: Use only this profile data when answering recruiter questions.
Do not invent companies, projects, tools, dates, or achievements.
If the job requires a skill not listed, say whether Binara has related transferable experience.
Always connect Binara's experience to real projects where possible.
For match scores, consider direct skill match, related experience, adaptability to new technologies, project evidence, and gaps.
